TH_YUYUKO-SEALED_SAIGYOU_AYAKASHI.title: Sealed Saigyou Ayakashi
TH_YUYUKO-SEALED_SAIGYOU_AYAKASHI.descri: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Spring[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-SEALED_SAIGYOU_AYAKASHI.flavor:
A strange cherry tree, beneath which lies the body of a maiden. Even sealed, it has the power to lure death.
Legend says that when the Saigyou Ayakashi blooms fully, the maiden buried under it will rise from death.
TH_YUYUKO-SAIGYOU_AYAKASHI_FAN.title: Mourning of Saigyou Ayakashi
TH_YUYUKO-SAIGYOU_AYAKASHI_FAN.descripti: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Spring[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-SAIGYOU_AYAKASHI_FAN.flavor:
Beneath the Saigyou Ayakashi lies Yuyuko's own body, so it can never fully bloom.
Otherwise, the revived Yuyuko would die again after a thousand years, turning to ash.
TH_YUYUKO-BLACK_FLOWER.title: Black Lotus
TH_YUYUKO-BLACK_FLOWER.description: The first time each turn you apply a debuff via a card, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_YUYUKO-BLACK_FLOWER.flavor: Ancient scriptures record that many of these flowers float on the surface of the "mana pool."
TH_YUYUKO-SCREEN.title: Gosho Wall Screen
TH_YUYUKO-SCREEN.description: Enemies with [gold]Death Wish[/gold] deal [blue]50%[/blue] less damage to you.
TH_YUYUKO-SCREEN.flavor: A decorative screen made after the pattern on Yuyuko's fan, unexpectedly containing powerful spiritual energy.
TH_YUYUKO-ROCK_SAKURA.title: Stone Cherry
TH_YUYUKO-ROCK_SAKURA.description: Whenever an enemy dies, gain [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to its [gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks.
TH_YUYUKO-ROCK_SAKURA.flavor: Favorite of vengeful spirits, even sparking a movement of "rather lose freedom than give up stone cherries," though they eventually became docile again.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_FAN.title: Cherry Blossom Folding Fan
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_FAN.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Death Wish[/gold], gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-SOUL_LANTERN.title: Soul Lantern
TH_YUYUKO-SOUL_LANTERN.description: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Death Lust[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-SOUL_LANTERN.flavor: A soul lantern is a Netherworld tool. Its light can be seen by ghosts no matter the distance or obstacles, attracting them.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_CAKE.title: Cherry Blossom Cake
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_CAKE.description:
Upon pickup, increase your Max HP by [blue]10[/blue].
At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Spring[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_CAKE.flavor: A cake said to be made from Saigyou Ayakashi petals. Who knows if eating it brings death?
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_CAP.title: Heavenly Crown
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_CAP.flavor: A white triangular cloth covering the head of the deceased in traditional Japanese funerals.
TH_YUYUKO-DANMA_GHOST.title: Danmaku Ghost
TH_YUYUKO-DANMA_GHOST.description: Whenever you take damage, if the base damage is not higher than your [gold]Block[/gold], reduce that damage to [blue]0[/blue].
TH_YUYUKO-DANMA_GHOST.flavor: Yuyuko Saigyouji's ability to erase danmaku upon grazing. For a ghost who cannot fear death, grazing poses no threat.
TH_YUYUKO-FOLDABLE_UMBRELLA.title: Gap Folding Umbrella
TH_YUYUKO-FOLDABLE_UMBRELLA.description:
When the count is not [blue]0[/blue], you may consume [blue]1[/blue] count while choosing a room on the next floor to ignore the current path.
Every [blue]2[/blue] new rooms entered increases the count by [blue]1[/blue].
TH_YUYUKO-FOLDABLE_UMBRELLA.flavor: Allows ordinary people to use gaps, though the size, distance, and direction are rather fixed.
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_BOOK.title: 《Azif》
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_BOOK.description:
Double the first debuff you apply via a card each turn.
Double the first buff you gain via a card each turn.
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_BOOK.flavor: A peculiar book containing encyclopedic knowledge of astronomy, geography, and hidden secrets.
TH_YUYUKO-FORGET_SOUP.title: Soup of Oblivion
TH_YUYUKO-FORGET_SOUP.flavor: A suspicious yellow-green broth. What will happen if you drink it?
TH_YUYUKO-NEW_BORN.title: New Birth
TH_YUYUKO-NEW_BORN.description:
You can no longer gain [gold]Spring[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-NEW_BORN.flavor: Having shed your old, decaying body, you are now a truly seamless ghost. No longer bound by physical limitations, you have completely escaped the threat of the Saigyou Ayakashi.
TH_YUYUKO-BLOOM_MARK.title: Bloom Mark
TH_YUYUKO-BLOOM_MARK.description:
Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all your cards. Whenever you obtain a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
You can no longer heal.
TH_YUYUKO-BLOOM_MARK.flavor: The Saigyou Ayakashi left a unique mark on you. Unwilling to sever the past, you revived your dead self, but your lifespan is now finite.
